message:
test(harmonica,lipgloss): add comprehensive unit tests for physics and styling

Expand test coverage for harmonica physics simulation and lipgloss styling
with detailed unit tests covering edge cases and API completeness.

Harmonica projectile tests (src/projectile.rs):
- test_projectile_setters: Verify position, velocity, acceleration setters
- test_vector_add/sub/mul/neg: Vector arithmetic operations
- test_vector_dot_product: Dot product computation
- test_vector_cross_product: Cross product in 3D space
- test_vector_normalize: Unit vector normalization
- test_vector_magnitude: Length computation
- test_point_operations: Point arithmetic with vectors
- test_projectile_at_rest: Static projectile behavior
- test_projectile_free_fall: Gravity simulation over time
- test_projectile_with_initial_velocity: Trajectory computation
- test_high_frame_rate_precision: 120fps accuracy test

Harmonica spring tests (src/spring.rs):
- test_spring_basic_creation: Constructor and defaults
- test_spring_with_damping: Damping coefficient effects
- test_spring_with_stiffness: Spring constant behavior
- test_spring_convergence: Settling toward target
- test_spring_overshooting: Under-damped oscillation
- test_spring_critical_damping: Optimal convergence
- test_spring_over_damping: Slow return without oscillation
- test_spring_state_inspection: Velocity and position accessors
- test_spring_rapid_target_changes: Dynamic target switching

Lipgloss style tests (src/style.rs):
- 50+ tests covering style creation, chaining, border rendering
- Padding, margin, alignment, width/height constraints
- Color application (foreground, background, border colors)
- Text transformation (bold, italic, underline, strikethrough)
- Inline mode, horizontal/vertical alignment
- Style inheritance and composition
- Border styles (normal, rounded, double, thick, hidden)
- Measurement and dimension calculation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
